mapper.select: SELECT device.device_code AS deviceCode,DATE_FORMAT(sync_time, '%H') AS timeValue, eh.real_value AS dataValue FROM em_level eh left join em_device_info device on device.device_code = eh.device_code JOIN (SELECT device_code,DATE_FORMAT(sync_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS hour_start,MAX(sync_time) AS last_time_per_hour FROM em_level WHERE company_code = #{companyCode} AND sync_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY device_code,DATE_FORMAT(sync_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')) grouped ON device.device_code = grouped.device_code AND eh.sync_time = grouped.last_time_per_hour ORDER BY eh.sync_time asc;
